name: agent-sandboxes
description: Advanced E2B sandbox operations via CLI (sbx). Use for full-stack app development in sandboxes, browser automation/UI testing, multi-agent parallel execution, hosting web apps with public URLs, and complex workflows (plan → build → host → test). Prefer over e2b-sandbox when needing CLI-based operations, browser validation, or full-stack workflows. Keywords: sandbox cli, e2b advanced, browser testing, host frontend, full-stack sandbox, sbx command, parallel agents, UI validation.
